so many of yall grinding when yall just wanna go to your state colleges or end up at ur safety

i grinded too hard in summer of 2023 before senior year to get a 1540. i only applied to 2 colleges cause i only wanted to go my state college. looking back i think i just wasted that summer studying 200 hours for that exam. i got a 1380 on it without studying and that just woulda been enough but i was too dumb to realize it back then.

i thought that discipline would build me into a better person in this state college too. first semester i did good , but next semester and in sophomore year im a just a hentai gooner about to wing this semester with a 3.0 gpa. i just feel burnt out at this point with nothing more to say. can't be bothered to care about internships. in senior year i tried too hard to gain validation for the 1540 score cause i wasted too much time on it so therefore i always brought it up. but it really meant nothing to others if they knew i was going to state college.

even those who doubt themselves getting into selective universities can take that into consideration . but it ain't good to doubt yourself, though I did.

idk why i am saying this, but the sat is not that deep yall. so sometimes i scoff at yall worshiping people who get a high score. just enjoy your life and make most of other things. ofc u don't wanna/gotta be like me.

## Official letter from Misfit

I want to clarify the situation regarding the September ACT with Wisedog and YSL.

After reviewing everything, I can confirm the following:
YSL was never my seller for September, and he was not responsible for the issues that happened with the September ACT versions. My September key came from Wisedog, not from YSL, which means he had no obligation to refund me since I was never his customer for that month. Any mismatch with the September ACT was entirely due to Wisedog’s key not matching, not because of anything in YSL’s part. He is not affiliated with Wisedog, but he just became his vendor and wasn’t the vendor for September, and he was not involved in any wrongdoing in this situation. Additionally, I want to address that plas wasn’t completely informed about this situation, which did lead to some misinformation being spread around.

This announcement is to clear up any misunderstanding and to confirm that YSL was not at fault, and acted professionally throughout this situation.
